content: Also, I know that real CG scoring system is slightly more complex. This problem reduces its complexity but still clearly demonstrates why handling draws properly might be the key to correct and STABLE ratings. Most of you know how much harder is to beat Silver/Gold league after ending of the real-time contest. It's mostly because of the draws. So the problem is like, you know, some meta-irony on this order of things. Don't know really, is it needed to inverse the loops order to show that the LATEST player will gain worst score on draws or it is obvious by itself.
Question: is it hard or medium? The solution is not very tricky.
